ham.subject: Your Flight Itinerary – Confirmation #987654
ham.body:
Dear Mr. Smith,

Thank you for choosing SkyHigh Airlines. This email confirms your upcoming flight. Please find the itinerary details below:

Booking Reference: 987654
Passenger Name: Mr. John Smith
Flight Number: SH 123
Departure: New York JFK – 08:30 AM, 15 Sept 2026
Arrival: Los Angeles LAX – 11:45 AM, 15 Sept 2026
Gate: 22
Seat: 12A

Check‑in is available online up to 24 hours before departure. Please bring a valid ID and your boarding pass.

If you have any questions or need to modify your reservation, contact our customer service at 1-800-555-1234 or email support@skyhigh.com.

Thank you for flying with us.

Best regards,
SkyHigh Airlines

spam.subject: Urgent: FedEx Shipment Delivery Fee Required – Immediate Action Needed
spam.body:
Dear Valued Customer,

Our records indicate that your recent FedEx shipment (Tracking #FD123456789) was not successfully delivered due to a missed delivery attempt. To avoid further delay, we must collect a missed delivery fee of $75.00.

Please verify your account details and complete payment within 48 hours. Failure to do so will result in shipment cancellation and potential additional charges.

Click the link below to confirm your
